patch_name: Combat Balance Changes — Abyssal Depths Patch 3
description: Abyssal Depths Patch 3 Combat Balance Changes (11 August 2025) — Axes, Crossbows, Cursed Staffs, Shapeshifter Staffs, Swords, Helmets, Shoes, Miscellaneous.

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes
sections.searchable_text: Combat Balance Changes Axes Tear Apart Halberd CC resistance Crossbows Sweeping Bolt Heavy Crossbow hit detection Cooldown Damage Cursed Staffs Haunting Screams Cursed Skull Shapeshifter Staffs Reality Fissure Cast time Swords Mighty Blow Broadsword Dash stand time End position offset Helmets Displacement Immunity Knight Helmet Cooldown Energizing Shield Shoes After Image Mistwalker Shoes Dash range Ethereal Form Feyscale Sandals Maximum Duration Miscellaneous Inner Shadow Shadowcaller visual

subsections.heading: Axes
subsections.searchable_text: Axes Tear Apart Halberd enemy CC resistance 0.2 4s

changes.raw_text: Tear Apart: Added: enemy CC resistance decreased by 0.2 for 4s
notes: Added: enemy CC resistance decreased by 0.2 for 4s

subsections.heading: Crossbows
subsections.searchable_text: Crossbows Sweeping Bolt Heavy Crossbow hit detection hitbox Cooldown 15s 20s Damage 192 225

changes.raw_text: Sweeping Bolt: Improved hit detection, including a slightly larger hitbox. Cooldown: 15s → 20s; Damage: 192 → 225.
notes: Improved hit detection and slightly larger hitbox

subsections.heading: Cursed Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Cursed Staffs Haunting Screams Cursed Skull Max duration 5.3s 5s Distance 12m 10m Damage per tick 28 31

changes.raw_text: Haunting Screams: Max duration: 5.3s → 5s; Distance covered: 12m → 10m; Damage per tick: 28 → 31

subsections.heading: Shapeshifter Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Shapeshifter Staffs Reality Fissure Cast time 0.4s 0.3s

subsections.heading: Swords
subsections.searchable_text: Swords Mighty Blow Broadsword Dash stand time 0.3s 0.1s End position offset -2.5m -2m

changes.raw_text: Mighty Blow: Dash stand time: 0.3s → 0.1s; End position offset: -2.5m → -2m

subsections.heading: Helmets
subsections.searchable_text: Helmets Displacement Immunity Knight Helmet Cooldown 30s 25s Energizing Shield all Helmets Caps Cowls Cooldown 20s 25s

changes.ability: Energizing Shield (all Helmets, Caps and Cowls):

subsections.heading: Shoes
subsections.searchable_text: Shoes After Image Mistwalker Shoes Dash range 11m 10m Ethereal Form Feyscale Sandals Maximum Duration 6.5s 6s

subsections.heading: Miscellaneous
subsections.searchable_text: Miscellaneous Inner Shadow Shadowcaller visual indication Plate Armor area

changes.raw_text: Inner Shadow: Improved visual indication of the area affected by Plate Armor's effect
notes: Improved visual indication of the area affected by Plate Armor's effect
